hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read -r cmd || exit 0; echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bpdflatex\b' || exit 0; texfile=$(echo "$cmd" | tr ' ' '\n' | grep '\.tex$' | head -1); [ -n "$texfile" ] || exit 0; outdir=$(echo "$cmd" | grep -oE -- '-output-directory[= ][^[:space:]]+' | sed 's/.*[= ]//'); dir="${outdir:-$(dirname "$texfile")}"; latexmk -c -outdir="$dir" "$texfile"; } 2>/dev/null || true
